response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified song performances. 2. Identified 'Ride on Time' performed by VTubers, resolved metadata, searched for lyrics. 3. Identified 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA' performed by VTubers, resolved metadata, searched for lyrics. 4. Created scene mappings.
response.global_summary: The video features a series of vocal performances by various VTubers, including performances of 'Ride on Time' and 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA'.

scenes.description: Two VTubers (Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame and another) perform 'Ride on Time' on a stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
青い水平線を今駆け抜けてく
研ぎ澄まされた時の流れ感じて
Oh ときめきへと動き出す世界は
忘れかけてた遠い夢の訪れ
Ride on time 彷徨う想いなら
優しく受け止めてそっと包んで
Oh ride on time 心に火をつけて
溢れる喜びに広がれride on time
僕の輝く未来さあ回り始めて
虚ろな日々も全て愛に溶け込む
Oh なんという朝今すぐ君のもと
届けに行こう燃える心迷わず
Ride on time 時よ走り出せ
愛よ光り出せ目も眩むほど
Oh ride on time 心に火をつけて
飛び立つ魂に贈るよride on time
届けに行こう燃える心今こそ
Oh ride on time 時よ走り出せ
愛よ光り出せ目も眩むほど
Oh ride on time 心に火をつけて
飛び立つ魂に贈るよride on time
Ride on time 彷徨う想いなら
優しく受け止めてそっと包んで
Oh ride on time 心に火をつけて
溢れる喜びに広がれride on time
Ride on time 時よ走り出せ
愛よ光り出せ目も眩むほど
Ride on time 心に火をつけて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Running through the blue horizon now
Feeling the flow of sharpened time
Oh, the world starts moving towards excitement
The arrival of a distant dream almost forgotten
Ride on time, if wandering feelings
Gently accept and softly embrace
Oh, ride on time, ignite the fire in the heart
Spread in overflowing joy, ride on time
My shining future is beginning to turn
All empty days melt into love
Oh, what a morning, let's go to you right now
Without hesitation, let's go deliver the burning heart
Ride on time, time, start running
Love, shine so brightly that even the eyes are dazzled
Oh, ride on time, ignite the fire in the heart
Offered to the soaring soul, ride on time
Let's go deliver the burning heart now
Oh, ride on time, time, start running
Love, shine so brightly that even the eyes are dazzled
Oh, ride on time, ignite the fire in the heart
Offered to the soaring soul, ride on time
Ride on time, if wandering feelings
Gently accept and softly embrace
Oh, ride on time, ignite the fire in the heart
Spread in overflowing joy, ride on time
Ride on time, time, start running
Love, shine so brightly that even the eyes are dazzled
Ride on time, ignite the fire in the heart

scenes.description: A group of VTubers performs 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA' on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
- (Spoken:) Sparking!
Hikaru kumo o tsukinuke Fly Away [Fly Away] Karadajuu ni hirogaru panorama Kao o kerareta chikyuu ga okotte [okotte] Kazan o bakuhatsu saseru
Toketa koori no naka ni Kyouryuu ga itara tamanori shikomitai ne
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA Nani ga okitemo kibun wa Henoheno kappa CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA Mune ga pachipachi suru hodo Sawagu genkidama . . . Sparking!
Sora o kyuukouka Jet Coaster [Coaster] Ochiteyuku yo panikku no sono he Keshiki sakasa ni naru to yukai sa [yukai sa] Yama sae oshiri ni mieru
Nayamu jikan wa nai yo Dokoka ni hisomu "bikkuri" ni aitai kara
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA Atama karappo no hou ga Yume tsumekomeru CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA Egao urutora Zetto de Kyou mo aiyaiyaiyaiyai . . . Sparking!
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA Atama karappo no hou ga Yume tsumekomeru CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA Egao urutora Zetto de Kyou mo aiyaiyaiyaiyai
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA Nani ga okitemo kibun wa Henoheno kappa CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA Mune ga pachipachi suru hodo Sawagu genkidama . . . Sparking!
